data.title: XPeng Joins NIO And Li Auto In Strategic Shift - Reportedly Overhauls Structure To Boost AI Focus

Anthony Scaramucci Thinks Crypto Industry's Virtual Meeting With Democrats Was 'Encouraging,' Despite Reportedly Heated Exchanges
data.description: A virtual meeting aimed at easing tensions between the cryptocurrency industry and the Democratic Party took a sharp turn on Thursday, highlighting the challenges faced by progressive crypto advocates in rallying industry support for Kamala Harris‘s presidential campaign.

data.title: Barrick Gold Preps For Q2 Earnings: Will It Unearth Bullish Prospects?
data.description: Barrick Gold reports Q2 earnings Monday. The stock is down 4.15% YTD but chart signals potential bullish breakout. Analysts see 45.85% upside.
